name: apa-prosecute
description: OPTIONAL post-filing office-action package for the Agent-Native-Patent-Artifact project (docs/protocol.md §9, beyond the core pre-filing scope). Parses an Office Action (prosecution/oa-NN.md), ESTIMATES the 37 CFR 1.136(a) response period from a string mailing date, and scaffolds a flags-and-questions response under the new-matter guard. Everything is a flag/question for a registered practitioner; deadlines are estimates to verify; APA never files. Reuses the shared parser (lib/apa-parse.mjs). Plain ESM, Node >=21, zero dependencies.
